locator.quote: EW may be where the predictor's edge actually resides

text: Caution against filtering EW: EW may be where the predictor's edge actually resides (extreme outsiders with mispriced place probabilities), and the agent's training signal goes flat without it.

locator.quote: the upside (matured pairs, profitable agent_closed pairs). Net EW

text: Filtering EW removes -£151 of cost but also removes the upside (matured pairs, profitable agent_closed pairs); WIN is -£238, so removing EW doesn't make the cohort profitable.
